name: Aidan O'Connell
summary: Mid-level Android Engineer with 5 years of experience developing and maintaining robust mobile applications. Proven ability to deliver high-quality code, collaborate effectively in agile teams, and contribute to all phases of the software development lifecycle. Seeking to leverage expertise in Kotlin and modern Android development practices to build innovative user experiences.

experience.title: Android Developer
experience.description: Developed and maintained core features for a flagship e-commerce Android application using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Collaborated with UI/UX designers and backend engineers to implement new functionalities and improve user experience. Implemented unit and integration tests to ensure code quality and stability. Participated in code reviews and mentored junior developers.

experience.title: Junior Android Developer
experience.description: Assisted in the development of an Android application for a leading financial services company. Wrote clean, maintainable Java code and learned Kotlin. Worked closely with senior developers to fix bugs and implement minor feature enhancements. Gained experience with version control systems (Git) and agile methodologies.

experience.title: Mobile Development Intern
experience.description: Supported the Android development team by performing basic coding tasks, testing application builds, and documenting features. Gained foundational knowledge of Android Studio and the Android SDK.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
